channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: U.S. can hold AI talks with China because ‘we are in the lead,’ Bessent tells CNBC as nations plan safety protocol
item.description: The U.S. Treasury Secretary also said President Donald Trump would likely comment on the Taiwan issue in coming days.

item.title: Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid 'Thucydides Trap' at high-stakes summit
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday morning for the start of a high-stakes summit that runs through Friday.

item.title: Americans still feel bad about the economy. When will it get better?
item.description: U.S. consumer sentiment has been on a downward trend since the Covid-19 pandemic. Inflation, wars and President Trump's tariffs are to blame, economists say.

item.title: Venezuela embarks on $150 billion restructuring of debt amid political turmoil
item.description: Venezuelan officials said they wanted to “free the country from the burden of accumulated debt.”

item.title: UBS hikes Nvidia price target, sees strong earnings report ahead
item.description: The investment bank has a buy rating on the semiconductor name.

item.title: Cuba says oil and diesel supplies have run dry under U.S. sanctions
item.description: A Cuban official said the situation is “extremely tense” as blackouts sparked protests in Havana on Wednesday.

item.title: Cerebras prices IPO above expected range, as Wall Street braces for AI tsunami
item.description: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO, and with the chipmaker's offering, investors are gearing up for some even bigger AI deals later this year.

item.title: Cisco's stock pops 17% on surging AI orders, as company says it's cutting almost 4,000 jobs
item.description: Cisco's AI story has finally started resonating with Wall Street, with the stock hitting a record late last year and continuing to rally in 2026.

item.title: S&P 500 futures climb after tech-driven rally leads index to new record: Live updates
item.description: A rally in the technology sector drove the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite to new intraday and closing records on Wednesday.

item.title: Allegiant CEO makes case for low-cost airline model as Sun Country acquisition closes
item.description: Allegiant CEO Greg Anderson said leisure travel demand is still strong despite higher fuel prices.

item.title: Beer demand stumbles as gas prices surge, data shows
item.description: U.S. beer sales slump as higher gas prices squeeze consumers, with convenience stores and high-fuel-cost states with higher-cost fuel seeing the sharpest declines.

item.title: Polestar CEO tells CNBC ‘pump anxiety’ has made EVs ‘all about money’
item.description: The EV maker is seeing an increased demand for both used and new cars as fuel prices have gone up following the disruption at the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Senators introduce ban on lawmakers becoming lobbyists
item.description: New bipartisan legislation, first seen by CNBC, would prevent U.S. lawmakers from lobbying after they leave office.

item.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang on China trip: ‘President Trump asked me to come’
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday landed in Beijing for the high-stakes summit with China.

item.title: Silver remains ‘fundamentally overvalued’ after wartime slump, says HSBC
item.description: Analysts at HSBC say the metal is "fundamentally overvalued" and could diverge from gold in its trajectory.

item.title: Kevin Warsh wins Senate confirmation as the next Federal Reserve chair
item.description: In the most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair, Warsh, 56, won confirmation to take over for Jerome Powell.

item.title: Microsoft feared being too dependent on OpenAI, Musk-Altman trial testimony reveals
item.description: Top Microsoft executives testified in Musk v. Altman this week, spelling out concerns they had in the early days of the partnership with OpenAI.

item.title: BTS to headline World Cup Final halftime show with Madonna, Shakira; Hybe shares jump 7.2%
item.description: The seven-member boy band will take the stage alongside Madonna and Shakira

item.title: Burberry stock drops even as Americas and China demand boost turnaround efforts
item.description: Full-year revenue came in largely in line with expectations at £2.4 billion.

item.title: This stock is our favorite way to hedge against the pickup in inflation
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Bond markets are bracing for UK PM Starmer's political rivals to break cover
item.description: The prime minister's colleagues could be ready to mutiny, with leadership bids potentially being announced Thursday.

item.title: This map shows the average credit score by state. Where does yours rank?
item.description: CNBC Select takes a look at the states with the highest and lowest credit scores, and some tools to help improve your own

item.title: Inside India newsletter: Trump-Xi meeting could test India’s positioning as China counterweight
item.description: For more than two decades, consecutive U.S. administrations have seen India as a counterbalance to China's growing influence in the Indo-Pacific.

item.title: Oil prices mixed as IEA flags greater volatility ahead, OPEC cuts demand forecast
item.description: OPEC cut its demand growth estimates for 2026 to about 1.2 million barrels per day.

item.title: Japan's global defense business may be on the cusp of a big breakout
item.description: Can Japan be a major player in the international defense sector, like its neighbor South Korea?

item.title: Trade wars to extended truce: Analysts expect ‘stabilization’ in U.S.-China ties as Trump-Xi meet
item.description: The world's two largest economies sought to stabilize fractured ties at their first high-level meeting in nearly a decade.

item.title: Trump-Xi summit revives China tech rally hopes as U.S. reportedly clears Nvidia H200 sales
item.description: Market watchers are betting that the Trump-Xi summit could extend trade truce and lift Chinese equities.

item.title: Mortgage rates move to highest level in 5 weeks, but homebuyers shake it off
item.description: Mortgage rates continued to climb higher, but stronger homebuyer demand helped to keep mortgage applications in positive territory.

item.title: Gas tax holiday as Trump promises? Not so fast, trucking, construction industries say
item.description: President Donald Trump and lawmakers are eyeing federal gas tax relief, but opponents contend a pause wouldn't help consumers and could harm roads.

item.title: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022
item.description: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
